content.en:
Source Sea.

The end of the ladder of time and space.

Ye Tian was the first to walk out, and then a famous Eternal Realm stepped into the Source Sea.

Rumble!!!!

The aura of the Eternal Realm was superimposed, causing a shock of the origin of the source sea.

Soon, 3,000 Eternal Realms officially arrived at the Source Sea.

At this point, they looked around and realized that this was indeed another Eternal Sea, and that the location of this place was something they had never heard of before.

This is a new eternal sea.

Suddenly.

These Eternal Realms are excited, if they are stationed here, there may be a lot of rare resources born here in the future, and they also hope to obtain some, and when the Source Sea develops, it will be easier to obtain resources here than the Infinite Sea.

Space-time territory.

Ye Tian came here with 3,000 Eternal Realms, and immediately attracted the attention of the Lord Alliance

Especially the Lord of Ice Han and the others, "One One Zero" saw so many Eternal Realms at once, and the lowest cultivation level was a nine-step Immortal Realm Lord, and they were all dumbfounded.

Soon after Ye Tian settled down these town guard legions, the five legendary lords including the Ice Han Lord came to find Ye Tian

Bloodbone Territory.

Lord Binghan stood in front of Ye Tian and was asking about the Legion of Guards.

"Endless Lord, these Eternal Realms you brought are not the Eternal Realms of the Source Sea and the Space-Time Territory, right?" asked the Ice Lord.

"It's really not!" Ye Tian didn't hide it, and said directly: "They are from the Infinite Sea, and now they are my army. "

"What, the !! of the legions"

Lord Binghan and the others couldn't believe it, so many Legendary Lords and Nine-Step Immortal Realm Lords, this was many times greater than the power of the Source Sea, and sending some Legendary Lords at will was enough to sweep through the Source Sea.

Yuanhai wants to give birth to so many legendary lords, I don't know how many years it will take, it is definitely an incomparably long time.

But now, so many Legendary Lords and Nine-Step Immortal Realm Lords turned out to be Ye Tian's legions.

How dare they imagine it!

"Endless Lord, how do you have so many Legendary Lords under your command?" asked the Holy Peak Lord curiously.

Ye Tian said with a smile: "I joined the True Nothing Holy Land of the Infinite Sea, that is, the mysterious force behind the True Nothing Legend Tower, and after joining, I became the town guard leader of the True No Holy Land, and I have the qualifications to recruit the Eternal Realm, and these Eternal Realms are resources to join my Town Guard Legion." Moreover, Yuanhai has become my town guard, and the threat of the Qin family is nothing. "

Knowing that the threat from the Qin family was gone, Lord Binghan and the others breathed a sigh of relief.

After chatting for a while, Lord Binghan requested: "Endless Lord, I want to go to the Infinite Sea, the Endless Lord can go to the Infinite Sea so quickly, and bring these Eternal Realms over.

Several other Legendary Lords also said that they also wanted to go to the Infinite Sea.

"Are you really going to the Infinite Sea?" Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" Lord Ice Han said with a smile: "Endless Lord, we just sent the clone, even if it really falls, it's not a big deal. If we don't go to the Infinite Sea, it will be difficult for us to continue to improve our strength, and it will be difficult for us to even step into the Initial Realm Lord. "

Ye Tian nodded, agreed, and said, "Yes, I will let you pass through the space-time ladder and soon arrive at the Infinite Sea, but after you enter the Infinite Sea, you must not reveal the location and situation of the space-time coordinates of the Source Sea, understand?"

"Understood!"

The five legendary lords, including the Lord of Ice Letter, responded one after another.

Subsequently, Ye Tian informed the location of the space-time ladder, and the five legendary lords sent their clones to walk up the space-time ladder, and soon disappeared on the space-time ladder, and had already entered the immeasurable sea.

......

In the vast void area, the legendary lords of the Qin family are still on their way, they have already passed through the dark barrier and are rushing towards the Purple Aurora Light Domain, but it takes a long time to cross the Purple Aurora Light Domain, so in a short period of time, these Qin family members will not be able to reach the Source Sea at all.

Ye Tian didn't worry about the threat of the Qin family anymore, now that he didn't have to worry about anything, he began to practice hard

Not only that, but he also sent a replica body to wait in the True Void Holy Land for a long time.

In the True Immortal Land, he could browse through a lot of precious inheritance classics, although the cultivation paths of the Infinite Sea and the Source Sea were a little different, but when they reached the level of the Legendary Lord, they were basically the same, and a lot of knowledge here was a supreme treasure to him.

Therefore, Ye Tian's continuous learning will be of great benefit to his future cultivation.

Other than that.

Ye Tian could use the treasure land of the True Saintless Land to enhance his will and the fusion of the improvement of will, body, and innate eternal rules, coupled with the assistance of the Mixed Yuan Order, Ye Tian's cultivation speed at the initial realm level was many times faster than before.

At this rate, it would not take too long for Ye Tian to step into the Consummation Realm Legendary Lord.

Eternal years passed

Before you know it, the long years have passed0........

On this day, Ye Tian finally broke through, and was promoted from the seventh step of the Origin Realm Legendary Lord to the eighth step, and eighty percent of the Eternal Force was born in his body, and his strength was much stronger than before.

Moreover, Ye Tian further perfected the Legendary-level Eternal Technique.

In the past, he had obtained too little inheritance, and his perception of the Legendary-level Eternal Technique was all based on his own understanding, and some aspects were not perfect, but now that he has obtained a large number of inheritances from the True Saintless Holy Land, he naturally has a new understanding of the Legendary-level Eternal Technique, so he has gradually perfected these Legendary-level Eternal Techniques.

Not only that, but he also often wandered around the Infinite Sea with the aim of replicating a large number of talents.

In the immeasurable sea, there are still a lot of immortal ancestral endowments, and if they are copied in large quantities, they can be fused into legendary ancestral endowments.

Therefore, with the passage of time, Ye Tian has gathered a lot of legendary ancestral endowments, which is a huge opportunity for Ye Tian, and his own potential will also be greatly improved.

As for whether there will be a legendary ancestor on top of the legendary ancestral endowment, Ye Tian is not very clear.

Because he has never seen the legendary ancestral endowment, and even those legendary lords do not have legendary ancestral endowments!

And what kind of talent the Legendary Realm Lord has, he doesn't know very well, he has never seen a Legendary Realm Lord so far, this kind of Legendary Realm Lord is very mysterious, and he will not show his face easily.

In the blink of an eye, a relatively long time had passed, and Ye Tian's cultivation had gone one step further, and his will, body, and innate eternal rules had been fused ninety percent, which could almost be regarded as the peak of the Initial Realm Lord.

If you go one step further, the body is perfectly fused with the will and the innate eternal 0.9 constant rule, it is ten percent fusion, that is, you have stepped into the realm of the Legendary Lord of the Consummation Realm

However, there is a huge shackle between the Initial Realm and the Consummation Realm, and many Initial Realm Legendary Lords are difficult to overcome.

However, as a Heavenly Rank Saint Son, Ye Tian was treated very well in the True Saintless Land, and he was able to enter many treasure lands, and he could even consult some half-step Legendary Realm Lords.

In addition, there is a place dedicated to breaking this shackle in the True No Holy Land, but the price paid is very high, but he can use it.

Therefore, for Ye Tian, it was really not difficult to break the shackles and be promoted to the Legendary Lord of the Consummation Realm

Of course, Ye Tian had not yet reached the level of impacting the Legendary Lord of the Consummation Realm, so there was no need to rush at the moment.

this day.

A large number of Legendary Realm Lords have appeared in the Void Area outside the Space-Time Territory of the Source Sea.

They are the legendary lords of the Qin family!

Qin family, here!_
